characters.name: Bridget Hennessy
characters.description: 17 (season 2)18 (season 3) Bridget Erin "Beege" Hennessy(1986-present) (portrayed byKaley Cuoco) is the beautiful, dim-witted oldest child ofCateandPaul's three kids. Initially, Bridget is the the stereotype of the blonde, popular bombshell who is interested in her looks, teenage boys and little else. She has many times mentioned she wears thong underwear. While dating Donny Doyle, Bridget once complained that all she had left was thongs having worn her "only real ... underwear to church". Sometimes she has a deep or intelligent moment, but these are few and far between. Initially, Bridget is the the stereotype of the blonde, popular bombshell who is interested in her looks, teenage boys and little else. She has many times mentioned she wears thong underwear. While dating Donny Doyle, Bridget once complained that all she had left was thongs having worn her "only real ... underwear to church". Sometimes she has a deep or intelligent moment, but these are few and far between. After her father dies, she starts to mature more; this was most likely because of the fact that the last words she ever said to him were "I hate you" because he wouldn't let her take the car on the morning of his death, and she feels guilty that she never got the chance to take it back. She has often proven to be very caring toward her family. Bridget is often seen butting heads with her younger sisterKerrybecause of their being the opposite of each other. Bridget is the happy but ditzy sister, with Kerry being the sarcastic but very intelligent sister.

characters.name: Bruno
characters.description: BrunowasKerry Hennessy's ex-boyfriend. She loses her virginity to him in Europe, but he turns out to be awful. He uses Kerry for sex and a place to stay, never intending to contact her again.

characters.name: Bruno
characters.description: BrunowasKerry Hennessy's ex-boyfriend. She loses her virginity to him in Europe, but he turns out to be awful. He uses Kerry for sex and a place to stay, never intending to contact her again.

characters.name: C.J. Barnes
characters.description: C.J. Barnes(portrayed byDavid Spade) isCateandPaul's nephew and was once in the Army. He claims to have studied aerial photography during the Gulf War, and to have received a Purple Heart in combat, which is in complete contrast with his generally childish attitude. He is a teacher at the school and often tries to pick up women, but fails to do so. When C.J. first arrives, he claims to have had a job at the circus operating a tilt-a-whirl ride. He lives along with hisGrandfatherin the basement (having previously lived in a van, which was burned by that same Grandfather). He once dated Mrs. Krupp, his cousins' (KerryandBridget) math teacher, but he ended up cheating on her with Principal Gibbs' ex-girlfriend, Cheryl. He once revealed that "C" in "C.J." stood for Corey (while trying to get a woman to go out with him) toRory'sgirlfriend's sister Sissy, but Rory said that it did not stand for Corey, and he was just making it up. He is also fascinated with the band Aerosmith.

characters.name: Cate Hennessy
characters.description: Cate Stinky Hennessy (née Egan)(Portrayed byKatey Sagal) isPaul Hennessy's wife and a mother ofBridget,Kerry&Rory Hennessy. She is a deauteragonist of Season 1, until when John Ritter passed away, she takes Paul's spot light as the protagonist of Season 2 & 3. She is a wife; a mother toBridget,Kerry, andRory; a nurse and easily the most sane and composed person in the family, who is made a widow byPaul'sdeath. She takes a nursing job at the kids' school so that she can work standard hours and spend more time with the kids. Cate starts dating her kids' High School Principal, Ed Gibb, towards the end of Season 3. At first, the rest of the family, especially the kids, do not take this well, claiming the potential relationship was "wrong on a million different levels". However, they grudgingly came to accept it. She received her middle name "Stinky" as a result of her father,Jimpromising his best friend he would name one of his children after him after accidentally stabbing him with a bayonet while they were drunk in Korea; to hide this, she claims that the S stands for "Stacy." characters.name: Jenna Sharpe
characters.description: Jenna Sharpeused to beBridget Hennessey'sworst rival until afterPauldied, and then they became friends. She is alsoNick Sharpe'sdaughter andRachel Sharpe'solder sister.

characters.name: Jenna Sharpe

characters.name: Jim Egan
characters.description: Jim Egan, portrayed by the Late James Garner (2003–2005), isLaura'sex-husband,Cate&Maggie'sfather and grandfather toBridget,Kerry,RoryandC.J. One of Jim's love interests is played by Connie Stevens, an actress James Garner often played in movies with.

characters.name: Jim's Father
characters.description: Mr. Eganwas the father ofJim Eganand two more siblings, as well as the paternal grandfather ofMaggie BarnesandCate Hennessy. After Paul died in "Goodbye", Rory asked Jim about his own father. Jim mentions that his father was a businessman who owned a haberdashery where he sold suits and bowler hats. He was also described a not always being a very happy man.

characters.name: Katie
characters.description: Katie Sharpe is the youngest Daughter ofNick Sharpeand a former girlfriend ofRory Hennessy

characters.name: Kerry Hennessy
characters.description: Bruno(ex-boyfriend)Jason(ex-boyfriend) Kerry Michelle "Care Bear" Hennessy(1987-present) (portrayed byAmy Davidson) is the middle child in the Hennessy family, younger sister toBridgetand older sister toRory. Kerry is the artistic and sarcastic middle child of the family. Often living in the shadows of her more popular and more attractive older sister, Kerry tends to be rather pessimistic and angry most of the time. She is very passionate about certain things, like her art, and animal rights. Kerry is the artistic and sarcastic middle child of the family. Often living in the shadows of her more popular and more attractive older sister, Kerry tends to be rather pessimistic and angry most of the time. She is very passionate about certain things, like her art, and animal rights. After Kerry's popularity begins to rise, she begins to mature and act more like Bridget. After Paul's death Kerry's personality changes; she starts to be a more nicer person and isn't as depressed.

characters.name: Kerry Hennesy
characters.description: Kerry Hennesy Kerry Michelle "Care Bear" Hennessy(Portrayed by Amy Davidson) Kerry is the middle child and not very happy about it. She is often seen as unattractive when compared to beautiful older sister, Bridget. She was accused by Bridget of stealing her (ex-) boyfriend, Kyle. She is sarcastic, and constantly makes snide remarks about essentially everybody, though less to her mother. She is also a passionate activist who cares about animals rights. Later, she lost her virginity to Bruno (her boyfriend in Europe) later in the third season. She is often annoyed at her sister and is easily upset. She is also very artistic and keeps a sketchbook. She is the smart child, but often shows naiveté.

characters.name: Kyle
characters.description: Kyleis portrayed by Billy Aaron Brown. Billy was born in Clarinda, Iowa. He attended Clarinda High School, and moved to Los Angeles to become an actor at 18 just after graduating. Kyleis a recurring character in the show who spends most of the shows run asBridget'sboyfriend. He begins a relationship withKerryin the season 1 episode "Sort of an Officer and a Gentleman" and ends in the season 3 episode "The School Nurse".

characters.name: Kyle

characters.name: Laura
characters.description: LauraisCate'smother, ex-wife ofJim Eganand grandmother toBridget,Kerry,RoryandC.J.. In "Goodbye", she and Jim, from whom she was separated came over to console their daughter and grandchildren after the death ofPaul.

characters.name: Maggie Barnes
characters.description: Maggie Barnes isC.J.'sreal mother andCate'sreal sister. Though Cate's and Maggie's relationship is weak since childhood, they get along when Maggie gets a divorce from her husband andPaulinvites her to stay at their house for a few days. Maggie isBridget&Kerry'sfavorite aunt and soon becomesRory'stoo since her b**bs become bigger.

characters.name: Michelle
characters.description: Michelle Sharpe is Nick Sharpe's eldest daughter.

characters.name: Missy Kleinfeld
characters.description: Missy Kleinfeldwas Rory's girlfriend. She is played byDaniella Monet.

characters.name: Nick Sharpe
characters.description: Nick Sharpe(played by Patrick Warburton) is the boss ofPaul Hennessy. Nick Sharpe He has four daughters. Their names areJenna,Katie,Michelle, andRachel. However, only Jenna and Michelle are seen in the Season 1 episode "Paul Meets His Match". When it comes to his daughters, Nick can be overprotective; likePaul, he also thinks boys are after one thing. In the season 2 episode Goodbye, he admitted toCatethat he viewed Paul as a great man, and one of those writers whose columns always made him laugh, either intentionally or unintentionally. Plus, like everyone else at the newspaper where Paul occasionally stopped by, he also had immense respect for Paul and his work.

characters.name: Paul Hennessy
characters.description: Paul Hennessy(Portrayed byJohn Ritterfrom 2002-2003) isCate'shusband and father ofBridget,KerryandRory. Paul is a former sports writer, who worked from home as a Lifestyle columnist. He is described as being "the master of the double standard", a "Psycho-Dad", and a perceived hypocrite who often embarrasses his children, even if he wants what's best for them. Paul also is very disapproving ofBridgetandKerrydating boys, because he claims boys only want one thing. But he isn't bothered aboutRorythat much, which causes Bridget and Kerry to be mad. Nonetheless, he loves his children, and wants them to have happy futures.

characters.name: Rachel Sharpe
characters.description: Rachel Sharpeused to beKerry Hennessy'sfriend until Kerry started dating Kyle. Rachel felt like a third-wheel. She is alsoNick Sharpe'sdaughter andJenna Sharpe's younger sister. Rory had a crush on Rachel Sharpe and referred to her as the "perfect women". This made Rachel happy because no one ever called her the perfect women. Rory and Rachel made-out, only to be caught by Kerry, who snapped Rachel out of it. Later Rachel declares it was only physical between them

characters.name: Rory Hennessy
characters.description:
14 (season 2)
15 (season 3) Rory Joseph Hennessy(1990-present) (portrayed by Martin Spanjers) is the youngest of the Hennessy family and the little brother ofBridgetandKerry. Martin Spanjers as Rory Hennessy He is referred to as "the boy" by his father,Paul. He constantly tattles on his sisters, receiving pleasure out of it, as per his remark when he had stirred the pot to his liking: "This is just like my birthday!" Usually he waits until his sisters already did whatever it was, then tattled just to see his father lose it as well. But he is still his father's favorite, being the boy. He is also involved in money-making schemes along withC.J.and is very immature at times as the youngest out of the three children. He can be seen playing video games in the living room and shows signs of always wanting a monkey, which he once had by trading some of his father's baseball trading cards; the monkey was later traded for a guitar, which was short-lived as Rory annoyed the family with it. He also delights in showing his friends the private aspects of his popular sister Bridget's life, mentioning once that his friends looted through Bridget's underwear drawer.

characters.name: Rory Hennesy
characters.description: Rory Joseph HennessyHe is often referred to as "The boy" by his father Paul. He constantly tattles on his sisters, getting twisted pleasure out of it, as per his remark when he had stirred the pot to his liking: "This is just like my birthday!" Usually he waits until his sisters already did whatever it was, then tattled just to see his father lose it as well, but he is still his father's favorite, being the boy. He is also involved in money-making schemes along with C.J. and is very immature at times as the youngest out of the three children. He can be seen playing video games in the living room and shows signs of always wanting a monkey, which he once had by trading some of his father's baseball trading cards; the monkey was later traded for a guitar, which was short-lived as Rory annoyed the family with it. He also delights in showing his friends the private aspects of his popular sister Bridget's life, mentioning once that his friends looted through Bridget's underwear drawer. Rory was hit hard by Paul's death and ended up punching a hole in his wall out of anger, cutting his hand. He covered for it saying he burnt it taking a casserole out of the oven. After he entered high school, Rory seemed to mature greatly and C.J. became the wisecracker of the family. However, Rory still had his moments.

characters.name: Sabrina
characters.description: SabrinaisRory Hennessy's first girlfriend.
